message: chore: update go deps and lint config

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-version: 2
+version: "2"
 
 run:
   timeout: 5m
@@ -38,26 +38,22 @@ linters:
     - nolintlint
     - wastedassign
     - unparam
-
-linters-settings:
-  gocyclo:
-    min-complexity: 30
-  gocritic:
-    enabled-checks:
-      - appendAssign
-      - badCond
-      - boolExprSimplify
-      - emptyStringTest
-      - evalOrder
-      - ifElseChain
-      - octalLiteral
-      - rangeValCopy
-      - unslice
-      - whyNoLint
+  settings:
+    gocyclo:
+      min-complexity: 30
+    gocritic:
+      enabled-checks:
+        - appendAssign
+        - badCond
+        - boolExprSimplify
+        - emptyStringTest
+        - evalOrder
+        - ifElseChain
+        - octalLiteral
+        - rangeValCopy
+        - unslice
+        - whyNoLint
 
 formatters:
   enable:
     - gofumpt
-
-issues:
-  exclude-use-default: false

@@ -1,16 +1,16 @@
 module github.com/steipete/gifgrep
 
-go 1.25
+go 1.25.0
 
 toolchain go1.25.5
 
 require (
-	github.com/alecthomas/kong v1.13.0
-	github.com/mattn/go-runewidth v0.0.19
-	golang.org/x/term v0.38.0
+	github.com/alecthomas/kong v1.15.0
+	github.com/mattn/go-runewidth v0.0.23
+	golang.org/x/term v0.42.0
 )
 
 require (
-	github.com/clipperhouse/uax29/v2 v2.2.0 // indirect
-	golang.org/x/sys v0.39.0 // indirect
+	github.com/clipperhouse/uax29/v2 v2.7.0 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/sys v0.43.0 // indirect
 )
